zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Preston於大約1380年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓時，她的父親Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston27歲，母親Elizabeth de Loundres24歲。她於1412年2月14日與Sir John Wogan在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達卡布瑞結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Preston于大约1380年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格爾曼斯頓时，她的父亲Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston27岁，母亲Elizabeth de Loundres24岁。她于1412年2月14日与Sir John Wogan在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達卡布瑞结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Preston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from one of the many places (most notably one in Lancashire) so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
occasionally from Middle English prest + son ‘son of the priest’. Priests were forbidden marriage but many produced illegitimate offspring.

variants.name: Presson
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Preston  .
French: occupational name for a presser of wine or oil, from a derivative of presser ‘to press’.

variants.name: Prestwich
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from a place in Lancashire (now Greater Manchester), so called from Old English prēost ‘priest’ + wīc ‘outlying settlement’, or from other places with the same derivation. Variants such as Prestidge, Prestage, etc., parallel the local pronunciation of the Lancashire name. Compare Preston .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Preston was born about 1380, in Gormanston, County Meath, Ireland, her father, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, was 27 and her mother, Elizabeth de Loundres, was 24. She married Sir John Wogan on 14 February 1412, in Carbury, County Kildare, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Preston est née environ 1380, à Gormanston, County Meath, Irlande, son père, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Loundres, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Wogan le 14 février 1412, à Carbury, County Kildare, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Preston um 1380 in Gormanston, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston 27 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Loundres 24. Sie hat am 14. Februar 1412 in Carbury, County Kildare, Irland Sir John Wogan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Preston è nata il circa 1380 nel Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Loundres, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Wogan il 14 febbraio 1412, nel Carbury, County Kildare, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Prestonが約1380年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスゴルマンストンで生まれた時，父Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanstonは27歳，母Elizabeth de Loundresは24歳であった。1412年2月14日にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアカーブリーでSir John Woganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Preston(이)가 대략 1380년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 고먼스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Loundres(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1412년 2월 14일 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 카버이에서 Sir John Wogan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Preston nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Loundres, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Wogan em 14 de fevereiro de 1412, em Carbury, County Kildare, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Preston родилась около 1380 г. в местности горманстон, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Loundres, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Wogan 14 февраля 1412 г. в местности карбури, коунти каилдар, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Preston nació aproximadamente 1380, en Gormanston, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, Sir Christopher Preston 2nd Baron Gormanston, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Loundres, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir John Wogan el 14 de febrero de 1412, en Carbury, County Kildare, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas.
